basic_details.short_information: Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital (JPCH) Junior Resident (MBBS) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital delhi.gov.in. A total of 3 Junior Resident (MBBS) vacancies have been announced through the JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC candidates

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from a recognized University, Valid registration with Delhi Medical Council
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized University. Valid registration with Delhi Medical Council. Must not have completed one year Junior Residency in any recognized institution.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56100 – 177500 of level 10 plus allowances as admissible under the rules

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.jag_pravesh_chandra_hospital_jpch: MBBS degree from a recognized University, Valid registration with Delhi Medical Council

content_sections.heading: JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JPCH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS degree from a recognized University. Valid registration with Delhi Medical Council. Must not have completed one year Junior Residency in any recognized institution.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC candidates

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 56100 – 177500 of level 10 plus allowances as admissible under the rules

content_sections.heading: JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital is scheduled for 10th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized University and have a valid registration with the Delhi Medical Council. They should also not have completed one year of Junior Residency elsewhere.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 56100 to Rs. 177500 per month, as per level 10 of the pay matrix, plus admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JPCH Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital, Delhi. The exact venue details and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including their MBBS degree certificate, Delhi Medical Council registration, ID proof, and any other relevant certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or ad-hoc position?
faq.answer: The Junior Resident (MBBS) positions at Jag Pravesh Chandra Hospital are advertised as Ad-hoc jobs.
